title: Top 3 Fruits
description: A tiny ranked-list prototype, going from number three down to number one.

items.title: Apple
items.subtitle: Classic • Crisp • Doctor-adjacent
items.comment: One a day keeps the doctor away.

items.title: Orange
items.subtitle: Citrus • Juicy • Halftime energy
items.comment: I bet you can't run with this.

items.title: Blueberry
items.subtitle: Tiny • Elite • Cinema-adjacent
items.comment: Led to the best movie of all time.
